label: Basecamp
description: Connect to Basecamp to manage projects, to-dos, messages, and team communication.

form.title: Connect Basecamp
form.subtitle: Authorize Anton to access your Basecamp projects and team data.

methods.label: Sign in with Basecamp (OAuth 2.0)
methods.description: OAuth 2.0 via your own Basecamp integration — register a free app on launchpad.37signals.com, paste your client credentials, and Anton opens the Basecamp consent screen in your browser. No passwords stored, revocable from your Basecamp account at any time.
methods.how_to:
## Sign in with Basecamp (OAuth 2.0 — Bring Your Own Client)

Basecamp's OAuth flow requires you to register a free integration app at 37signals' developer portal. This takes about two minutes.

### 1. Register an integration

1. Go to [launchpad.37signals.com/integrations](https://launchpad.37signals.com/integrations) and sign in with your Basecamp account.
2. Click **Register another application**.
3. Fill in the form:
   - **Name**: anything recognizable, e.g. `Anton`
   - **Website**: any URL, e.g. `https://example.com`
   - **Redirect URI**: `http://127.0.0.1` (Anton uses a local redirect)
4. Click **Register this app**.

### 2. Copy your credentials

5. On the app detail page you'll see a **Client ID** and **Client Secret**. Copy both.

### 3. Paste into Anton

6. Enter your **Client ID** and **Client Secret** in the fields below.
7. Click **Submit**. Anton will open the Basecamp authorization screen in your browser.
8. Sign in and click **Allow** to grant Anton access.

### Notes

- The Client Secret is shown immediately after registration. Store it somewhere safe — you can reveal it again on the app page if needed.
- To revoke access later, go to your Basecamp account → **Profile → Authorized apps** and remove the entry for Anton.
- Basecamp does not use named scopes; the token grants access to all Basecamps your account belongs to.

fields.name: client_id
fields.label: Client ID
fields.description: Found on your app's detail page at launchpad.37signals.com/integrations.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.label: Client Secret
